description: Create bitstream.rs in integral-core with BitReader and BitWriter types. Support read_bits(n), write_bits(value, n), read_nibbles(count), write_nibbles(value, count), align_to_byte(). Must be no_std-compatible for WASM. Include round-trip unit tests for various bit widths, byte alignment, nibble packing.
title: Bitstream bit reader/writer engine
